freezingDeath.one: One villager freezes to death in the cold.
freezingDeath.other: {{count}} villagers freeze to death in the cold.

madnessDeath.one: One villager succumbs to madness and takes his own life.
madnessDeath.other: {{count}} villagers succumb to madness and take their own lives.

investmentComplete.success: {{amount}} Gold investment complete: Success. You gained {{payout}} Gold.
investmentComplete.successLucky: {{amount}} Gold investment complete: Lucky Chance! You gained {{payout}} Gold.
investmentComplete.wipeout: {{amount}} Gold investment complete: Wipeout. You lost your full investment of {{amount}} Gold.
investmentComplete.failure: {{amount}} Gold investment complete: Failure. You lost {{loss}} Gold.

stranger.variant0: A stranger approaches and joins the village.
stranger.variant1: A traveler arrives and decides to stay.
stranger.variant2: A wanderer appears and becomes part of the community.
stranger.variant3: Someone approaches the village and settles in.
stranger.variant5: A newcomer arrives and makes themselves at home.
stranger.multiple1: {{count}} travelers arrive and decide to stay.
stranger.multiple2: {{count}} wanderers arrive and join the community.

building.darkEstate: The Dark Estate stands has been built on a small hill near the village, offering solitude and refuge.
building.blacksmith: The blacksmith's forge comes alive. The heart of industry now beats in the village.

gameplay.forestUnlocked: The village is encircled by a dense, dark forest. Danger lingers in the air, though it may also be a good place to chop wood and hunt.
